title: Ducky
body:
## Ducks

![DUCKS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/204c8f74cf1bc0a94a928de68d1f9c0e16b8fac5.png)

![DUCKS_RIVER](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/710770ee7b79031737ebd491a39c97c4a64512eb.png)
## Breed

Ducks can breed using seeds.



## Tame

Ducks can be tamed using beetroot seeds.



## Collars

The color of the collar can be changed by using any dye.

## Pink Duck

The pink duck can appear naturally very rarely
